article_title: B.C. Reg. 243/2025 – British Columbia Assessment Authority

briefs.title: BC Assessment updates property valuation rates for railways, pipelines, power lines, and telecom cables for 2026
briefs.summary: BC Assessment (the provincial body that sets property values for tax purposes) has updated the rates used to calculate the assessed value of railways, pipelines, electrical transmission lines, and telecom cables in British Columbia for the 2026 assessment year. The year reference in the regulation has been changed from 2025 to 2026, and the valuation table has been replaced with new figures.
briefs.action_required: If you own or operate a railway, pipeline, power line, or telecom infrastructure in BC, review the new 2026 valuation rates.

key_dates.label: BC railway, pipeline, and telecom rights-of-way valuation rates for 2026 take effect

briefs.article_title: B.C. Reg. 243/2025 – British Columbia Assessment Authority
